compiler_bugs.title: Reentrancy Guard Failure
compiler_bugs.description: Faulty implementation of the nonreentrant decorator allows reentrancy attacks. The reentrancy lock is not properly set before external calls, enabling attackers to re-enter protected functions.
compiler_bugs.exploit_template: Call vulnerable function → re-enter before lock sets → drain funds
compiler_bugs.real_world: Curve Finance hack July 2023 — $70M+ stolen across multiple pools

compiler_bugs.title: Storage Slot Collision in Inherited Contracts
compiler_bugs.description: Storage variables in contracts using multiple inheritance may collide, leading to unexpected state corruption or unauthorized access.
compiler_bugs.exploit_template: Manipulate one storage variable to corrupt another via slot collision

compiler_bugs.title: Integer Bounds Check Bypass on Slice
compiler_bugs.description: The slice() builtin does not properly validate bounds, allowing out-of-bounds memory reads that can leak sensitive data or cause unexpected behavior.
compiler_bugs.exploit_template: Pass crafted length to slice() → read out-of-bounds memory

compiler_bugs.title: Buffer Overflow in extract32
compiler_bugs.description: The extract32 builtin can read beyond allocated memory bounds when the offset parameter is near the end of a bytes array, potentially exposing sensitive data.
compiler_bugs.exploit_template: Pass offset near end of bytes array to extract32() → out-of-bounds read

compiler_bugs.title: Incorrect Uint Bounds with Decimal Type
compiler_bugs.description: Decimal type conversions to uint may produce incorrect results near boundary values, leading to arithmetic errors in financial calculations.
compiler_bugs.exploit_template: Pass boundary decimal value → incorrect uint conversion → arithmetic exploit

compiler_bugs.title: Incorrect ABI Encoding of Structs
compiler_bugs.description: Structs with dynamic types are incorrectly ABI encoded, which can cause cross-contract calls to pass corrupted data, leading to logic errors or fund misrouting.
compiler_bugs.exploit_template: Call function expecting struct with dynamic field → corrupted data passed → logic bypass
